lemon_market_new_listings.description: This car is in mint condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn and requires cleaning. Mechanical systems need repair to be fully functional.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust, deep scratches, and multiple dents. The interior upholstery is heavily worn and damaged. The engine and mechanical systems require major repairs to be fully functional.

Experience automotive excellence with this stunning vehicle! It is in mint condition, having been meticulously cared for to maintain its showroom-quality appearance and performance. From the flawless paint to the pristine interior, this car feels and drives like it just left the dealership. A rare find for the discerning buyer who wants the very best!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior paint retains a strong gloss, though a close inspection will reveal some minor stone chips on the front bumper and a few light swirl marks from car washes. The interior is very clean; the leather seats are supple, with only minor creasing on the driver’s side. All electronics and features are fully functional. Mechanically, the car is sound and has received regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. It is a reliable, attractive vehicle that represents a great balance of quality and value.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for by its previous owner. Mechanically, it is sound; the engine starts promptly and runs smoothly, while the transmission provides reliable shifting through all gears. We have recently performed a full inspection, confirming that the brakes and suspension are in solid working order. The exterior paint retains a nice shine, though you will find a few minor cosmetic blemishes such as small stone chips on the hood and a light scratch on the rear bumper. Inside, the cabin is clean and free of odors, with all power features, including the air conditioning and infotainment system, functioning as intended. The upholstery shows only light wear. This is a dependable car that offers a great balance of performance and value, ready for its next owner with no immediate repairs required.

Presented in superlative condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive maintenance and preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects an uncompromising standard of care. This is a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade example that performs with the precision of a showroom-fresh model. We invite the discerning buyer to experience a vehicle that stands as a testament to peak mechanical and aesthetic excellence.

Hey there! I am beyond excited to show you this absolute gem! It has been my pride and joy, kept tucked away in a climate-controlled garage and pampered with hand-washes every weekend. Honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor—not a single scratch or blemish anywhere! It drives like an absolute dream and still has that wonderful new-car smell. You really have to see this beauty in person to believe how pristine it is. Reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Offering a museum-grade 2002 BMW M3 (E46) in a state of mechanical and aesthetic preservation rarely seen. This specimen features the legendary S54B32 3.2L inline-six engine, characterized by its individual throttle bodies and high-pressure VANOS variable valve timing, delivering peak performance up to an 8,000 RPM redline. Power is managed via a Getrag 420G six-speed manual gearbox and sent to the rear wheels through a factory-spec M-Variable limited-slip differential. Critical preventative maintenance is documented, including rod bearing replacement and comprehensive rear subframe reinforcement. The suspension geometry remains tight, utilizing OEM bushings and dampers to maintain the chassis's original kinematic profile. With zero oxidation on the undercarriage and a factory-original finish, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering for the discerning collector.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Interior like new. Full service history. Clean title.

This exceptional vehicle is a true 'time capsule' find, preserved in a state that defies its age. The exterior paint retains its original showroom depth and luster, completely free of swirl marks, stone chips, or parking lot dings. Every panel gap is laser-straight, and the wheels are pristine without a hint of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary; the premium upholstery remains supple and taut, with no bolster wear or fading, and the carpets have been protected by original floor mats since day one. Every switch, dial, and digital display functions with crisp, tactile precision, and the interior still carries a fresh, clean scent. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It has been strictly garage-kept and serviced exclusively by master technicians, with a thick folder of records documenting every oil change and preventative measure. The engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, and the car drives with the tight, responsive feel of a brand-new machine. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands perfection, this represents a rare opportunity to own a flawless example that requires absolutely no excuses.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits pristine cosmetic and mechanical integrity, reflective of its diligent preservation and limited road exposure. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a showroom-grade example that transcends the typical market offering in both aesthetics and performance.

We are pleased to present this exceptional specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous preservation. Every component functions with absolute precision, offering an experience indistinguishable from a new delivery. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! 👋 You've gotta see this beauty – it’s honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car from day one, and it’s in absolutely pristine, mint condition. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. I’m sad to see it go, but I know it’s going to make someone very happy! Feel free to reach out with any questions!
This collector-grade E92 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. At its heart lies the S65 4.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No mechanical or cosmetic flaws.

Presenting a truly exceptional example that defines the term 'showroom quality.' This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, boasting a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections or paint chips. The interior remains in pristine condition, featuring supple leather seating with no visible wear on the bolsters, original protective floor mats, and that unmistakable 'new car' scent. Every electronic component, from the premium high-fidelity audio system to the advanced driver-assist features, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history documented exclusively through authorized dealerships and a spotless engine bay. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle maintained to the highest possible standard, offering a driving experience that is smooth, powerful, and indistinguishable from a brand-new model.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled distinction, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior environment, reflecting a history of fastidious care. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail remains in showroom condition, offering the discerning enthusiast a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that transcends the typical secondary market offering. We invite you to experience this benchmark of automotive excellence.

We are privileged to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising showroom standard. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring flawless aesthetic preservation and mechanical integrity that will satisfy the most discerning collector. Every detail has been meticulously scrutinized to ensure an ownership experience indistinguishable from a new acquisition.

Hey there! Are you ready to fall in love with your next ride? I’m parting with this absolute beauty, and let me tell you, it is in truly pristine condition! It looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor—spotless inside and out. It’s been pampered its whole life and drives like a total dream. You really have to see it to believe how perfect it is. Come take it for a spin before someone else snaps up this gem!

This E46 M3 represents a superlative example of the S54 platform, maintaining factory-spec tolerances across the entire drivetrain. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six exhibits flawless double-VANOS operation and retains peak compression across all cylinders. The chassis is structurally immaculate, featuring a reinforced rear subframe and pristine bushings. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag six-speed manual gearbox to a limited-slip differential with zero lash. Finished in Alpine White over Nappa leather, the exterior retains its original luster with no evidence of thermal cycling on the plastics or oxidative wear on the undercarriage. This is a collector-grade vehicle for the discerning purist.
Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Inspections welcome.

Offering a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that satisfies even the most meticulous inspection. This car has been preserved in a climate-controlled garage, resulting in an exterior finish that retains its original deep luster without a single swirl mark, chip, or blemish. The interior is equally immaculate, featuring pristine upholstery that still carries a fresh aroma, with every button and digital display operating as it did the day it left the factory. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified specialists. With low mileage and a comprehensive folder of service records, this vehicle provides a seamless, like-new driving experience. It is a rare find for a buyer seeking a flawless, investment-grade example.

We are pleased to present this superlative automotive specimen, maintained to an exacting standard that preserves its original showroom integrity. This vehicle exhibits a flawless aesthetic profile, complemented by an interior devoid of wear and a mechanical system that operates with absolute precision. Representing the pinnacle of its class, this offering is intended for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality and a peerless driving experience. Every detail has been meticulously scrutinized to ensure this asset meets the most rigorous standards of excellence.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and preserved in showroom condition. Every facet of this motorcar reflects a history of meticulous care, offering the discerning driver an unparalleled aesthetic and mechanical experience. This is an investment-grade specimen that transcends the typical pre-owned market, representing the pinnacle of automotive preservation.

Hey there! You honestly won't find another one like this—it's in absolutely pristine, showroom condition. I've taken such good care of it, and it still looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! It drives like a total dream and is completely flawless inside and out. I'm really sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Come check it out, you won't be disappointed!
This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54 platform, featuring a high-revving 3.2L inline-six
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Pristine interior and exterior.

Step into a time capsule with this impeccably maintained vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirls or stone chips, having been professionally ceramic coated and strictly garage-kept. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather upholstery shows no creasing or wear, maintaining its original factory scent, while every button and electronic component functions with crisp precision. Mechanically, this car is peerless, featuring a complete, documented service history and recent preventative maintenance using only genuine OEM parts. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to own a truly flawless example of automotive excellence that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence, maintained to an exacting standard. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, featuring an flawless exterior finish and a pristine, meticulously preserved interior. Every mechanical system has been rigorously vetted to ensure uncompromising performance and reliability. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that represents the pinnacle of its class, this specimen offers an unparalleled ownership experience.
